name: satsu-membership-v1
description: Merkle membership proof for Satsu privacy pool. Proves knowledge of a commitment pre-image (secret, nullifier, amount) that is a leaf in the Merkle tree with a stated root, and that sha256(nullifier) equals the revealed nullifierHash.

privateInputs.name: secret
privateInputs.description: Random secret; pre-image component of the commitment.

privateInputs.name: nullifier
privateInputs.description: Random nullifier; its hash is revealed at withdrawal for double-spend prevention.

privateInputs.name: amount
privateInputs.description: Deposit amount in micro-sBTC, encoded as 16-byte big-endian uint128 to match Clarity's native uint representation.

privateInputs.name: leafIndex
privateInputs.description: Position of the commitment leaf in the Merkle tree (0-indexed).

privateInputs.name: merklePathElements
privateInputs.description: Sibling hashes along the authentication path from leaf to root.

privateInputs.name: merklePathIndices
privateInputs.description: Direction bits for each step: 0 = current is left child, 1 = current is right child.

publicInputs.name: nullifierHash
publicInputs.description: Hash of the nullifier, revealed on-chain for double-spend prevention.

publicInputs.name: root
publicInputs.description: Merkle root of the commitment tree at the time of withdrawal.

publicInputs.name: recipient
publicInputs.description: Stacks address receiving the withdrawal. Bound to prevent front-running.

publicInputs.name: relayerFee
publicInputs.description: Fee paid to the relayer. Bound to prevent fee manipulation.

constraints.name: commitment_preimage
constraints.description: The commitment is correctly formed from the secret, nullifier, and amount.

constraints.name: nullifier_hash
constraints.description: The revealed nullifier hash matches the private nullifier value.

constraints.name: merkle_membership
constraints.description: The commitment leaf is in the Merkle tree with the stated root.

constraints.name: public_input_binding
constraints.description: Public inputs are bound to the proof via a Fiat-Shamir challenge, preventing front-running and fee manipulation.

proofFormat.description: Serialized proof layout for on-chain verification.
